category_sources: GitHub README says PaPILO provides parallel presolve routines for mixed-integer linear programming problems.
source_facts.description says "Parallel Presolve for Integer and Linear Optimization".
display_name_sources: Repository README heading is "PaPILO — Parallel Presolve for Integer and Linear Optimization".
docs_sources: GitHub README documents dependencies, building, binary usage, and library usage.
Repository README says PaPILO is part of the SCIP Optimization Suite at scipopt.org.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/scipopt/papilo, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Repository README describes PaPILO as a C++14 package for presolve routines on mixed-integer linear programming problems.
Repository README says it provides an executable and can be used as a header-based library.
